---
title: "False Discovery Rate Control"
author: "Scott McCabe"
toc: true
number-sections: true
highlight-style: pygments
format: 
  html: 
    code-fold: true
    html-math-method: katex
    embed-resources: true
    self-contained-math: true	
  pdf: 
    geometry: 
      - top=30mm
      - left=20mm
execute:
    warning: false
---
# False Discovery Rate Control

## Why False Discovery Rate Matters

## Classical Approach vs. Modern Methods

## Definitions

## The 4 Methods

## Simulation

## Key Takeaways

## References
